prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Honda E07Z (660cc turbocharged inline-3)** with a **Garrett GT12 turbo upgrade**, ported and polished cylinder head, and **Toda Racing forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)** for 120+ hp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** for precise boost control (1.2 bar peak)

Full **Spoon Sports N1-spec engine mount set** and **Ultra Racing 4-point strut bar** to eliminate chassis flex, paired with a **K-Tuned lightweight flywheel** and **OS Giken twin-plate clutch** for rapid rev matching

Custom **HKS Hi-Power exhaust** with a **4-2-1 header (SUS304 stainless steel)** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller**, mated to a **Spoon Sports N1-spec oil cooler** and **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** for thermal stability
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 That's-specific widebody kit** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders**, extended 30mm per side for **18x8.5 +35 Enkei PF05 wheels** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD09 195/45R18 tires**

**Spoon Sports N1-spec front lip spoiler** and **custom rear diffuser** (3D-printed ABS with **carbon fiber weave overlay**), paired with **JDM-spec yellowed headlights (HID retrofit with Morimoto D2S 4300K bulbs)**

**Recaro SRD-II seats (JDM-spec)** with **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, **Mugen MF-10 3-spoke steering wheel**, and **custom digital gauge cluster (Defi Advance BF series with oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR readouts)**
